description: Hand-labeled inbound replies used to bench the triage classifier. The deterministic heuristic in lib/replyTriage.ts must score >= 80% on this set; the LLM path is expected to do better. Add new cases liberally — the bar holds.

cases.label: interested-pricing
cases.body: This sounds interesting — can you send pricing for a team of about 50?

cases.label: interested-call
cases.body: Happy to chat. Does Thursday at 2pm work, or send me a calendar link.

cases.label: interested-question
cases.body: Quick question — does this integrate with HubSpot out of the box?

cases.label: interested-tell-more
cases.body: Tell me more. Curious how this compares to what we're using now.

cases.label: objection-already-have
cases.body: Thanks but we already have a vendor for this and we're locked in for the year.

cases.label: objection-not-fit
cases.body: Honestly, not a fit for what we're trying to do. Best of luck.

cases.label: objection-budget
cases.body: Looks neat but no budget right now — and frankly it's too expensive for our stage.

cases.label: objection-remove
cases.body: Please remove me from this list. Not interested.

cases.label: not-now-circle-back
cases.body: Bad timing on our end. Can you reach out later — maybe in Q3?

cases.label: not-now-next-quarter
cases.body: Currently focused on a migration. Ask me again next quarter, I'll have more headspace.

cases.label: not-now-revisit
cases.body: We're swamped through year-end. Worth revisiting in January.

cases.label: ooo-vacation
cases.body: I'm currently away on vacation until Monday with limited access to email. For urgent items please contact our support team.

cases.label: ooo-auto-reply
cases.body: This is an automatic reply. I am out of the office and will be back on the 14th.

cases.label: ooo-holiday
cases.body: Thanks for your email. I am away from my desk on holiday and will respond when I return.

cases.label: interested-send-over
cases.body: Sounds good — send over a one-pager and I'll forward to the team.

cases.label: objection-wrong-person
cases.body: I'm no longer the right person for this — please stop emailing me on this thread.
